mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM lkt_mch WHERE review_status = 1 AND store_id = #{store_id}
#{mchid,jdbcType=INTEGER}

choose.when: and EXISTS (select x.id from lkt_mch_promise x where x.mch_id=a.id and status=1)
choose.otherwise: and not EXISTS (select x.id from lkt_mch_promise x where x.mch_id=a.id and status=1)

sql.if: and (a.user_id like concat('%',#{mchName1},'%') or a.name like concat('%',#{mchName1},'%') or a.tel=#{mchName1})

mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_mch a left join lkt_user as u on a.user_id = u.user_id left join lkt_mch_promise p on p.mch_id=a.id
